tail_boost_primary.suspended_reason: RETIRED 2026-02-27. Strictly dominated by duration_tail_robust (which adds duration awareness). 0W/11L live, -$125. Systematic upward bias: avg bet bucket 200+ vs actual ~82. No unique signal worth iterating.
tail_boost_primary.description: Primary production strategy. TailBoost is most trusted due to highest bet volume (60 bets in backtest) giving strongest statistical confidence at +44.4% ROI.
tail_boost_primary.notes: Most trusted model. 60 bets in 38 events = trades frequently with consistent edge.

duration_tail_robust.description: Most robust by absolute P&L. Duration-aware shrink + tail boost. Restricted to daily/short after investigation: +$1101 ROI on daily/short vs -$98 on weekly in live paper trading.
duration_tail_robust.notes: Restricted to daily/short 2026-02-27. Weekly markets removed: 0W/9L live, systematic upward bias (+186 tweets avg) on weekly crowd EV.

asymmetric_selective.description: Highest ROI model (152.6%) but selective: only 9 bets in 38 events. Best for small bankrolls where you want max return per bet.
asymmetric_selective.notes: WARNING: -91% on bronze tier. Z-score is regime-specific. Use with caution.

per_bucket_proven.description: Original proven model with symmetric z-score momentum. Well-understood mechanics.
per_bucket_proven.notes: WARNING: -92% on bronze tier. Z-score is regime-specific. Use with caution.

duration_shrink_simple.description: Simplest profitable model: just shrinks crowd EV for short events. Easy to explain and verify.
duration_shrink_simple.notes: Simplest model. Only trades daily/short markets where crowd overestimates.

crowd_baseline.description: Control strategy that agrees with market. Should produce 0 bets.

signal_enhanced_volume.suspended_reason: RETIRED 2026-02-27. Correlated duplicate: bet identical buckets as 9 other strategies (e.g., 10 strats on 40-64 for Feb 23-25). No independent signal vs TailBoost/ConsensusEnsemble. 0W/3L live, -$40. Keep v3 codebase as iteration base only.
signal_enhanced_volume.description: New best strategy by total P&L. TailBoost v3 enhanced with Tesla/crypto/Wikipedia signals. 188 bets at +17.7% ROI, +$395 P&L. Replaces tail_boost_primary as most trusted.
signal_enhanced_volume.notes: Highest P&L of any single-model strategy. require_temporal_features=false since financial+attention features have 98.7% coverage.

signal_enhanced_selective.suspended_reason: SUSPENDED 2026-02-27. Right idea (high min_edge filtering) but insufficient live data (2 bets). Keep suspended until regime recalibration complete, then re-evaluate at 5% min_edge on daily/short only.
signal_enhanced_selective.description: Highest ROI strategy: +84.4% on 22 bets at 5% min_edge. Financial/attention signals dramatically improve bet selection when filtering aggressively. Best for capital-constrained deployment.
signal_enhanced_selective.notes: Best risk-adjusted. Higher max_bet_pct (10%) since fewer but higher-quality bets. Deploy this for paper trading.

signal_enhanced_v4_volume.suspended_reason: RETIRED 2026-02-27. Correlated duplicate of signal_enhanced_volume (v3). Added signals (VIX, Trends, F&G) provided no differentiation: bet same buckets as v3/v5. 0W/3L, -$42.
signal_enhanced_v4_volume.description: V4 model with 7 signals (VIX + Google Trends + Crypto F&G added). Volume strategy at 2% min_edge. RETIRED: no independent signal vs v3.
signal_enhanced_v4_volume.notes: V4 with 7 signals. require_temporal_features=false since financial+attention+trends features have 95%+ coverage.

price_dynamics_primary.suspended_reason: SUSPEND-ITERATE 2026-02-27. Momentum signal is real (backtest +33% ROI) but broken by regime shift: crowd EV anchor ~293 vs live ~105. 0W/3L live, -$39. Iterate: recalibrate momentum on Oct 2025+ data, restrict to daily/short.
price_dynamics_primary.description: Momentum-following tail boost. Backtest +33.1% ROI but regime-shifted. ITERATE candidate after recalibration.
price_dynamics_primary.notes: Requires price_dynamics features in features.json (run analyze_price_dynamics.py first).

consensus_primary.suspended_reason: RETIRED 2026-02-27. Ensemble of 3 broken models (TailBoost + PriceDynamics + SignalEnhanced v3) that all share same crowd-EV anchor. No independent signal: when one fails, all fail. 0W/3L live, -$37.
consensus_primary.description: Ensemble of TailBoost + PriceDynamics + SignalEnhanced v3. RETIRED: all components share crowd-EV anchor that regime-shifted.
consensus_primary.notes: Requires price_dynamics features. Uses TailBoost(0.30) + PriceDynamics(0.40) + SignalEnhanced v3(0.30).

xgb_bucket_primary.description: First ML model. XGBoost classification on bucket-level features. Requires training (scripts/train_xgb_model.py --retrain).

backtest_summary.notes: Walk-forward CV. Overfits — raw classification produces too many false edges.

xgb_bucket_primary.notes: First real ML strategy. Run scripts/train_xgb_model.py --retrain before deployment.

xgb_residual_primary.suspended_reason: SUSPEND-ITERATE 2026-02-27. Distribution shift: trained on crowd_ev ~293, live crowd_ev ~105. 0W/8L live, -$176. Salvageable: residual framing is sound (+28.4% CV ROI). Requires retraining on Oct 2025+ data ONLY, then restrict to daily/short.
xgb_residual_primary.description: Residual correction over crowd prices. ITERATE candidate: retrain on post-Oct 2025 data with current regime crowd EV.

backtest_summary.notes: Walk-forward CV results. Best ML model.

xgb_residual_primary.notes: Residual learning: predicts correction to crowd prices. Run scripts/train_xgb_model.py --retrain --framing residual before deployment.

signal_enhanced_v5_volume.suspended_reason: RETIRED 2026-02-27. Correlated duplicate of v3/v4. Extra signals (govt, corporate, momentum) produced no bucket-level differentiation. 0W/3L live, -$37.
signal_enhanced_v5_volume.description: V5 model with 10 signals. RETIRED: no differentiation from v3/v4, correlated duplicate.
signal_enhanced_v5_volume.notes: 10-signal composite. Weaker bronze performance (-46.9%) but strong gold/silver. Paper trade to validate live.

signal_enhanced_v6_reddit.description: V6 model with 12 signals (v5 + Reddit post spike + r/elonmusk activity). Newest signal model — no backtest yet, paper trade for live validation.

backtest_summary.notes: No backtest yet — newest model, paper-trade for live validation.

signal_enhanced_v6_reddit.notes: Newest model, no backtest history. Reduced max_bet_pct (3%) for conservative sizing during validation.

cross_market_arb_gold.description: Cross-market consistency arb: daily vs weekly divergence. Strong on gold (+55.4%) and silver (+384.4%), fails on bronze (-60%). Restricted to recent-period markets where cross-market data exists.
cross_market_arb_gold.notes: Restricted to daily/short markets where cross-market divergence signal is strongest. Higher min_edge (3%) and lower sizing to manage bronze-tier risk.

band_1_aggressive.suspended_reason: Suspended 2026-02-23. This registry ID ('band_1_aggressive') does not match what generate_band_signals.py emits. The code hardcodes strategy_id='band_1' (see BAND_CONFIG in scripts/generate_band_signals.py line 52). All live paper trading bets were recorded under 'band_1', not this ID. This entry has zero live history and is superseded by the 'band_1' entry. Kept for audit trail only.
band_1_aggressive.description: Registry alias that was never emitted by production code. generate_band_signals.py emits strategy_id='band_1'. Superseded by band_1 entry added 2026-02-23.

backtest_summary.notes: Never used in production. generate_band_signals.py emits 'band_1', not this ID.

band_1_aggressive.notes: Audit trail only. Superseded by band_1 entry.

band_1.suspended_reason: RETIRED 2026-02-27. Meta-strategy over correlated base models. When all base models share the same crowd-EV anchor, 4+ agreement = correlated failure with amplified sizing (0.30 Kelly). 0W/1L settled live, -$36. All base models now retired or suspended.
band_1.description: Meta-strategy: 4+ base strategies agree. RETIRED: base models are correlated duplicates, consensus amplifies shared failures.

backtest_summary.notes: Meta-strategy: not directly backtestable. Live result: 0/3 wins, -100% ROI, -$101.67.

band_1.notes: Meta-strategy. Runs via generate_band_signals.py. Requires 4+ strategies to agree on same bucket. SUSPENDED 2026-02-23: see suspended_reason.

band_2_moderate.description: Meta-strategy: 2-3 base strategies agree on same bucket. Quarter-Kelly sizing.

backtest_summary.notes: Meta-strategy: not directly backtestable. Aggregates live signals from base strategies.

band_2_moderate.notes: Meta-strategy. Standard sizing when 2-3 strategies agree.

directional_signal_primary.suspended_reason: SUSPEND-ITERATE 2026-02-27. Unique signed-signal approach (only model with directional prediction). 0W/3L at 2% edge, but backtest shows +75.1% ROI at 5% edge. Iterate: raise min_edge to 5%, restrict to daily/short, recalibrate signal weights on Oct 2025+ data.
directional_signal_primary.description: First directional model. ITERATE candidate: unique signed-signal approach, strong at high conviction (5% edge). Needs recalibration + daily/short restriction.
directional_signal_primary.notes: First model with directional prediction. Strong on gold/silver, weaker on bronze. At 5% edge: +75.1% ROI.

regime_tail_primary.suspended_reason: RETIRED 2026-02-27. Failed both backtest (-80.5% ROI, 36 bets) AND live (-$130, 0W/3L). Highest per-bet loss of any strategy ($43/bet avg). Regime signal concept is unsalvageable in current form.
regime_tail_primary.description: Regime-aware asymmetric tail boost. RETIRED: failed backtest and live. Fundamentally broken.
regime_tail_primary.notes: Issue #5 fix. Paper trade to validate regime-aware asymmetric tail boost vs symmetric TailBoost.

crowd_hedged_primary.suspended_reason: RETIRED 2026-02-27. Strict subset of ConsensusEnsemble (itself retired). When CE fails, CH fails with amplified sizing (0.40 Kelly). 0W/3L live, -$48. No independent signal.
crowd_hedged_primary.description: CrowdHedged: filtered ConsensusEnsemble bets. RETIRED: dependent on broken CE, amplified losses with higher sizing.
crowd_hedged_primary.notes: Strict subset of ConsensusEnsemble bets. All 37 CH bets are also CE bets; the 21 filtered-out CE bets contributed only +$28. Higher Kelly justified by higher-quality bet selection.
